category_sources: Official Solarus game page lists Genre as Action-RPG, Adventure.
source_facts.description: Zelda Mystery of Solarus DX.
display-name: The Legend of Zelda: Mystery of Solarus DX
display_name_sources: Official Solarus game page title: The Legend of Zelda: Mystery of Solarus DX.
source_facts.homepage points to the official game page.
docs_sources: Official Solarus game page is the primary official documentation surface for the game.
Official Solarus walkthrough page provides game documentation/walkthrough content.
repo_sources: Official Solarus game page links Source code to the GitLab project https://gitlab.com/solarus-games/games/zsdx.
tags_sources: Official GitLab project describes it as a Zelda fangame created with Solarus.
Official Solarus page describes it as the first game made with Solarus and lists Action-RPG, Adventure.
